changeSet.author: cinex-team
cinex-team
cinex-team
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM bookings WHERE theater_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM theaters WHERE code = N'CNX-HN');

changeSet.author: cinex-team
cinex-team
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM snack_orders WHERE theater_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM theaters WHERE code = N'CNX-HN');

changeSet.author: cinex-team
cinex-team
cinex-team
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM combos WHERE theater_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM theaters WHERE code = N'CNX-HN');

changeSet.author: cinex-team
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM snacks WHERE theater_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM theaters WHERE code = N'CNX-HN');

changeSet.author: cinex-team
cinex-team
cinex-team
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM rooms WHERE theater_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM theaters WHERE code = N'CNX-HN');

changeSet.author: cinex-team
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM movie_runs WHERE theater_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM theaters WHERE code = N'CNX-HN');

changeSet.author: cinex-team

cinex-team
cinex-team
cinex-team
cinex-team
cinex-team
cinex-team
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM theaters WHERE code <> N'CNX-HN';
